query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS operator_availability (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  operatorId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  operatorName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  isAvailableForChat BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('available', 'busy', 'away', 'offline') DEFAULT 'offline' NOT NULL,
  maxConcurrentChats INT DEFAULT 3 NOT NULL,
  currentActiveChats INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  lastActiveAt BIGINT,
  statusMessage VARCHAR(255),
  updatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX availability_operator_idx (operatorId),
  INDEX availability_status_idx (status),
  INDEX availability_available_idx (isAvailableForChat)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  operatorId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  operatorName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  isAvailableForChat BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('available', 'busy', 'away', 'offline') DEFAULT 'offline' NOT NULL,
  maxConcurrentChats INT DEFAULT 3 NOT NULL,
  currentActiveChats INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  lastActiveAt BIGINT,
  statusMessage VARCHAR(255),
  updatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX availability_operator_idx (operatorId),
  INDEX availability_status_idx (status),
  INDEX availability_available_idx (isAvailableForChat)
);
